x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Customer and asset location data is critical for Now Assist FSM AI scheduling optimization and travel time calculation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all work orders have a location record linked. Enforce via mandatory field at work order creation. Geocode customer addresses where possible. Target: 90%+ of work orders with location data.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb7
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Customer and asset location data is critical for Now Assist FSM AI scheduling optimization and travel time calculation.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Customer Location Data</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('wm_order');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed work orders in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed work orders found in the last 12 months. Location data coverage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithLoc = new GlideAggregate('wm_order');
    gaWithLoc.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4');
    gaWithLoc.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaWithLoc.addQuery('location', '!=', '');
    gaWithLoc.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithLoc.query();
    var withLoc = gaWithLoc.next() ? parseInt(gaWithLoc.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withLoc / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed work orders have location (last 12 months, ' + withLoc + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 90) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of work orders have location data. Now Assist FSM can optimize travel time and geographic dispatch using AI.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of work orders have location data (target: 90%). Now Assist FSM travel time optimization will be incomplete for work orders without location.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of work orders have location data. Now Assist FSM travel time optimization and geographic AI dispatch are not possible without location on work orders.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000433</number><order>60</order><remediation_guidance>Ensure all work orders have a location record linked. Enforce via mandatory field at work order creation. Geocode customer addresses where possible. Target: 90%+ of work orders with location data.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Customer Location Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_0bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb7</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
